description: Build module-stratified 80/10/10 splits with identical theorem indices across the rough and fine policies, and serialize per-policy train/dev/test JSONL.
motivation: Prepare the within-theorem paired SFT data for the main comparison.
formal_results: 607 pairs split into train 485 / dev 59 / test 63, identical theorem indices across rough and fine; both policies serialized (rough term-mode ~7.5MB train, fine tactic ~0.2MB).
results_description: A paired rough/fine SFT corpus, ready to train.
conclusions: The main experiment's data is prepared (paired, length-aware); training has not been run.
